mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, EN_CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_SHORT, REMARK, STAUTS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_CUSTOMER
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_CUSTOMER(ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, EN_CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_SHORT, REMARK, STAUTS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enCustomerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerShort, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stauts, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_CUSTOMER SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CUSTOMER_CODE = #{customerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EN_CUSTOMER_NAME = #{enCustomerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_SHORT = #{customerShort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STAUTS = #{stauts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, INVOICE_NAME, INV_ADDRESS, INV_TEL, INV_BANK, INV_BANK_NO, INV_TAX_NO, INV_KIND_FLAG, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME FROM M_CUSTOMER_INVOICE where CUSTOMER_CODE = #{customerCode}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO M_CUSTOMER_INVOICE( ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, INVOICE_NAME, INV_ADDRESS, INV_TEL, INV_BANK, INV_BANK_NO, INV_TAX_NO, INV_KIND_FLAG, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME )
select #{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.customerCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invoiceName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invBank, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invBankNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invTaxNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invKindFlag, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.now} FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE, CUSTOMER_TYPE_NAME FROM M_CUSTOMER_TYPE where CUSTOMER_CODE = #{customerCode}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO M_CUSTOMER_TYPE( ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE, CUSTOMER_TYPE_NAME )
select #{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.customerCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.customerTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.customerTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM DUAL
